creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
While network statistics is displayed elsewhere in the webpage, "System Overview" loses slightly its meaning and usefulness if it can't display a summary of the current network activity.

How to repeat: install net-mgmt/netdata from ports using the default settings, or from package, on recent src/main or src/stable/13, I haven't tried src/stable/12 nor 11, run "service netdata onestart", point your browser to "http://localhost:19999/", and observe the top row.
